title: Akbar becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Akbar, also known as Akbar the Great, was the third Mughal emperor, who reigned from 1556 to 1605.

title: Babur becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Babur was the founder of the Mughal Empire in the Indian subcontinent.

title: Aurangzeb becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Alamgir I, commonly known by the title Aurangzeb, was the sixth Mughal emperor, reigning from 1658 until his death in 1707.

title: Shah Jahan becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Shah Jahan I, also called Shah Jahan the Magnificent, was the fifth Mughal Emperor from 1628 until his deposition in 1658.

title: Jahangir I becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Nur ud-din Muhammad Salim, known by his royal name Jahangir, was the fourth emperor of the Mughal Empire, reigning from 1605 until his death in 1627.

title: Humayun becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Nasir al-Din Muhammad, commonly known by his regnal name Humayun, was the second Mughal emperor, who ruled over territory in what is now eastern Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Northern India, and Pakistan from 1530 to 1540 and again from 1555 to his death in 1556.

title: Bahadur Shah Zafar becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Bahadur Shah II, also known by his poetic title Bahadur Shah Zafar, was the twentieth and last Mughal emperor and an Urdu poet.

title: Bahadur Shah I becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Bahadur Shah I or Shah Alam I, was the eighth Mughal emperor from 1707 to 1712.

title: Shah Alam II becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Shah Alam II, also known by his birth name Ali Gohar, or Ali Gauhar, was the seventeenth Mughal emperor and the son of Alamgir II.

title: Muhammad Shah becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Mirza Nasir-ud-Din Muḥammad Shah was the thirteenth Mughal emperor from 1719 to 1748.

title: Farrukhsiyar becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Farrukhsiyar, also spelled as Farrukh Siyar, was the tenth Mughal Emperor from 1713 to 1719.

title: Jahandar Shah becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Jahandar Shah was the ninth Mughal emperor briefly from 1712 to 1713.

title: Akbar Shah II becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Akbar II, also known as Akbar Shah II, was the nineteenth Mughal emperor from 1806 to 1837.

title: Alamgir II becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Mirza Aziz-ud-Din Muhammad, better known by his regnal name Alamgir II, was the fifteenth Mughal emperor from 1754 to 1759.

title: Ahmad Shah Bahadur becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Ahmad Shah Bahadur, also known as Mirza Ahmad Shah or Mujahid-ud-Din Ahmad Shah Ghazi, was the fourteenth Mughal emperor from 1748 to 1754.

title: Azam Shah becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Mirza Abu al-Fayaz Qutb al-Din Muhammad Aazam, commonly known as Azam Shah, was briefly the seventh Mughal emperor from 14 March to 20 June 1707.

title: Rafi ud-Darajat becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Mirza Rafi ud-Darajat ; 1 December 1699 – 6 June 1719) was briefly the Eleventh Mughal emperor.

title: Shah Jahan II becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Shah Jahan II, born Mirza Rafi-ud-Daulah, was briefly the twelfth Mughal emperor in 1719.

title: Shah Jahan III becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Shah Jahan III, also known as Mirza Muhi-ul-Millat, was the sixteenth Mughal emperor, albeit briefly.

title: Jahan Shah IV becomes Mughal emperor
fact: Bidar Bakht Mahmud Shah Bahadur (Persian: بیدار بخت محمود شاه بهادر, also known by his regnal name Jahan Shah, was the eighteenth Mughal emperor for a brief period in 1788 after Shah Alam II was deposed by Ghulam Kadir, Mahmud Shah Bahadur was the son of a former Mughal Emperor, Ahmad Shah Bahadur.
